# Milkcrate — Full Store Listing

> Browse vinyl records like a record store. Curated Discogs storefronts for independent record shops.

Full store listing is available at [the Explore directory](/explore). Our store directory updates daily with the latest store data and inventory counts.

For individual store pages, append the Discogs username to milkcrate.fm — e.g., /philadelphiamusic for Philadelphia Music.

Each store page includes:
- Curated crates organized by genre, wall picks, and featured bins
- JSON-LD structured data (LocalBusiness schema with ItemList and BreadcrumbList)
- Open Graph and Twitter Card metadata for social sharing
- Full inventory browsing via the Discogs handoff

Store count and inventory data may vary. Check /explore for the current directory.
